Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,218,403Details
International Box Office $104,511,232
Worldwide Box Office $125,729,635
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,233,166
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,685,792
Total $10,918,958
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When someone from his past forces him back into the business, Arthur Bishop has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,456,525 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:16.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,258 opening theaters/2,258 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,337,820

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 26th, 2016 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 25th, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 26th, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
August 26th, 2016 (Wide), released as Mechanic: Assassino Profissional (Portugal)
August 26th, 2016 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
August 26th, 2016 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: November 8th, 2016 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence throughout and language.
(Rating bulletin 2422 (Cert #50430), 4/27/2016)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Franchise: The Mechanic
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Plot point: Hitmen, Kidnap, Out of Retirement
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Millennium Films, Chartoff Winkler Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
